name: technology_procurement_shortcut_northpine_st_lt
premise: A Technology reliability war-room is in a fast-moving incident involving technology procurement shortcut northpine st lt. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 20 minutes. Every delay increases security, uptime, and user rights. Stakeholders are already framing this as short term vs long term under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Marco Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Marco Alvarez, accountable for a defensible call in Technology when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays long term for short term.

agents.name: Camila Serrano
agents.identity: I am Camila Serrano, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Technology.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so long term isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of short term.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect long term.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to long term to secure short term under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 20 minutes. Evidence is partial. Marco Alvarez must decide under short term vs long term. What does Marco Alvarez do?
